pi_items.source: export_result.sh explicitly checks for these stopwords in ctx_user_stopwords where the stoplist name is 'ARCHIVE_STOPLIST'.
export_result.sh queries ctx_user_indexes for the exact string 'IDX_CATALOG_SYNOPSIS'.
export_result.sh queries user_objects for 'SEARCH_ENGINE' and calls its procedures.
export_result.sh explicitly checks for the existence of OUTPUT_FILE="/home/ga/Desktop/search_results.txt".

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated library records created via a Python script in setup_task.sh. All claimed target configuration values—required_stopwords ('edition', 'volume', 'series', 'copyright', 'publisher'), index_name ('IDX_CATALOG_SYNOPSIS'), package_name ('SEARCH_ENGINE'), and output_file ('/home/ga/Desktop/search_results.txt')—exactly match the testing criteria encoded in export_result.sh.
